_comment: Fixture audio specs. build.py reads this, synthesizes via espeak-ng, wraps each in a minimal MKV. The 'tmdb_id' / 'movie_*' fields are used by the Radarr provisioner — Radarr cross-checks tmdbIds against TMDB before accepting a movie record, so the IDs must point at real (public-domain) films.

clips.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The early bird catches the worm. Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
El veloz murciélago hindú comía feliz cardillo y kiwi. La cigüeña tocaba el saxofón detrás del palenque de paja.
